title: Handle podman-remote --arch, --platform, --os
body:
Attempt to hijack #9896. My buildah-diffs script was a mess, and
made it impossible to produce clean diffs.

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@containers/podman-maintainers PTAL. This is three commits: #9943 (which I would like to merge first, independently); then Dan's #9896, then a small conflict fix for the diffs.
